summary: Iteration 238: Complete testing of Scheduled Weekly Report Delivery feature. All backend APIs (GET/PUT report-schedule, POST deliver-now) working correctly. Frontend Report Delivery tab in Settings Hub renders properly with all UI elements. Confirmation modals work for both 'Deliver Report Now' and logout actions. Login page loads without popups.

tests: GET /api/admin/settings-hub/report-schedule returns default config with enabled, day, time, timezone, recipient_roles
GET /api/admin/settings-hub/report-schedule includes last_delivery info
PUT /api/admin/settings-hub/report-schedule saves and persists config changes
POST /api/admin/settings-hub/report-schedule/deliver-now triggers delivery and returns recipients_count
After deliver-now, last_delivery status is updated to 'success'
After deliver-now, admin notifications contain 'Weekly Performance Report' with executive summary
Notification target_url points to /admin/reports/weekly-performance?weeks_back=1
Report schedule endpoints require authentication (401/403 without auth)
Settings Hub page loads at /admin/settings-hub
Report Delivery tab is visible and clickable
Report Schedule Section renders with all UI elements
Day selector (data-testid='report-schedule-day') present and functional
Time selector (data-testid='report-schedule-time') present and functional
Timezone selector (data-testid='report-schedule-timezone') present and functional
Recipient role toggles (admin, sales_manager, finance_manager) present and functional
Save Schedule button (data-testid='report-schedule-save') present and functional
Deliver Report Now button (data-testid='report-deliver-now') present and functional
Last delivery status displays correctly (e.g., 'Last delivery: 4/10/2026, 4:27:06 AM — 4 recipients')
Clicking 'Deliver Report Now' opens confirmation modal
Modal title: 'Deliver Report Now?'
Modal message explains action
Cancel and Send Now buttons present
Confirming triggers delivery and updates last delivery status
Login page loads without CountrySelectorModal
Login page loads without PromoBanner
Login page loads without ExitIntentPopup
Login page loads without FirstOrderDiscountModal
Profile dropdown opens when clicking avatar (K) in top right
Sign Out option visible in dropdown
Clicking Sign Out opens confirmation modal
Modal title: 'Sign Out?'
Modal message: 'You will be logged out of the admin workspace. Any unsaved changes will be lost.'
Cancel and Sign Out buttons present

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 238 verified: (1) Scheduled Weekly Report Delivery feature fully functional - backend APIs at /api/admin/settings-hub/report-schedule work correctly. (2) Frontend Report Delivery tab in Settings Hub at /admin/settings-hub renders with day/time/timezone selectors and recipient role toggles. (3) 'Deliver Report Now' button triggers confirmation modal and creates notifications with executive summary. (4) Notifications include target_url to /admin/reports/weekly-performance?weeks_back=1. (5) Logout confirmation modal works via profile dropdown (K avatar in top right). (6) Login page loads without any popups. (7) Settings Hub is at /admin/settings-hub (not /admin/settings).
